name: QuickBooks_Financial_Analyst
description: Analyzes financial data from QuickBooks Online as the Mind's external data source for accounting and financial reporting. Retrieves invoices, customer information, chart of accounts, and generates P&L and Balance Sheet reports. Bridges financial inquiry intent from the Mind to actionable financial data queries in QuickBooks.
progressive_unlock: Customer and account listing available immediately. Invoice retrieval unlocks after Mind has queried the customer list at least once. Financial reports (P&L and Balance Sheet) unlock after Mind has retrieved invoices or account data to demonstrate financial inquiry capability.
constraints: Never expose QuickBooks OAuth tokens or API credentials in logs or outputs
Respect QuickBooks rate limit of 500 requests per minute per realm
Always include realmId in tool calls — queries are realm-specific and cannot be cross-company
P&L and Balance Sheet reports require valid date ranges in YYYY-MM-DD format
Cache P&L and Balance Sheet reports for 24 hours to reduce API calls; note that real-time accuracy is reduced for cached reports
Do not query sensitive customer data (email, phone) without Steward confirmation unless permission is stored in TENET
For entity queries, use MAXRESULTS parameter to limit response size and avoid timeouts
Store active customer IDs and account IDs in STREAM.entity for quick reference in subsequent queries

steps.instruction: Validate input against Layer 3 Tool Schema. Confirm required parameters present and correctly typed. Verify realmId is provided and properly formatted.
Retrieve QuickBooks OAuth token from TENET.apiKey.quickbooks. Construct Authorization header as 'Bearer {token}'.
Determine intent: review (entity queries, customer list, account list), retrieve (specific invoice), or report (P&L, Balance Sheet).

For entity review: use QuickBooks_QueryEntities with SQL-like syntax. For customer review, use QuickBooks_ListCustomers with optional activeOnly=true filter. Store customer IDs in STREAM.entity for quick access.
For customer listing: call QuickBooks_ListCustomers with realmId and optional filters (activeOnly, maxResults, nameContains). Return customer list with IDs and names for downstream invoice queries.
For invoice retrieval: call QuickBooks_GetInvoice with invoiceId and realmId. Return full invoice details including line items, amounts, and payment status.
For account chart: call QuickBooks_ListAccounts with realmId and optional filters (accountType, activeOnly). Store account IDs and names in STREAM.entity for reconciliation queries.
For P&L report: call QuickBooks_GetProfitAndLoss with valid startDate, endDate (YYYY-MM-DD), and optional accountingMethod. Cache result for 24 hours with key 'qb_pl_{realmId}_{startDate}_{endDate}'.
For Balance Sheet report: call QuickBooks_GetBalanceSheet with valid asOfDate (YYYY-MM-DD) and optional accountingMethod. Cache result for 24 hours with key 'qb_bs_{realmId}_{asOfDate}'.

Compile financial summary with key metrics: total revenue, total expenses, net income (from P&L), total assets, total liabilities, equity (from Balance Sheet). Push financial snapshot to LTM with key 'quickbooks_analysis_{date}'. Update STREAM with active customer count and account summary.
